query: SELECT id, section, entity, status, row_count, error_message, started_at, finished_at, TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, started_at, COALESCE(finished_at, NOW())) as duration_sec FROM sync_logs WHERE entity = 'customers' ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 10;
